query_strategy: Multiple YouTube search.list requests, each targeting a specific media intent.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find a YouTube playlist, mix, or curated song collection that matches the event context.
query_candidates.q: classic funk disco breaks early hip hop DJ playlist 1970 1973

request_params.q: classic funk disco breaks early hip hop DJ playlist 1970 1973

query_candidates.reason: The event is about records and breaks becoming reusable DJ material, so a curated playlist fits the sound context.
review_risks: Check for modern generic funk playlists that do not connect to early hip-hop DJ practice.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find a DJ set, break mix, party mix, turntablism demonstration, or historically framed mix.
query_candidates.q: classic funk disco breaks early hip hop DJ mix 1970 1973

request_params.q: classic funk disco breaks early hip hop DJ mix 1970 1973

query_candidates.reason: A DJ mix can represent how breaks were sequenced and extended for dance floors.
review_risks: Use as contextual sound material, not as evidence of a specific historical set.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find explanatory video, documentary context, archival footage, or scene history.
query_candidates.q: funk disco breaks early hip hop DJ culture documentary 1970 1973

request_params.q: funk disco breaks early hip hop DJ culture documentary 1970 1973

query_candidates.reason: Documentary context can explain how breaks became building blocks for DJ culture.
review_risks: Reject unrelated funk or disco histories that do not discuss breaks or early hip-hop.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find a concrete song, recording, music video, live clip, or performance-related upload.
query_candidates.q: classic breakbeat funk disco records early hip hop DJs 1970 1973

request_params.q: classic breakbeat funk disco records early hip hop DJs 1970 1973

query_candidates.reason: The event references records broadly, not one title; this query may surface representative breakbeat recordings.
review_risks: Do not treat any single result as the definitive source record for the event.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find context about a named historical event, scene shift, cultural moment, or local history.
query_candidates.q: breakbeats funk disco records hip hop origins 1970 1973 history

request_params.q: breakbeats funk disco records hip hop origins 1970 1973 history

query_candidates.reason: The event benefits from broader historical explanation of how breakbeats entered hip-hop practice.
review_risks: Check that results discuss DJ use of breaks rather than later breakbeat genres.

omitted_intents.reason: The event does not name a specific artist, DJ, producer, or venue.
The event is music-material focused rather than place-focused.

review_notes: Check whether results are historically relevant before adding links.
Reject YouTube Shorts, reaction shorts, teaser clips, and unrelated short-form uploads.
Keep all automatically found links as draft until editorial review.
Verify channel/source quality before promoting any media link to reviewed.
